message: Node started: Test the possibility of k(n)=2. This requires checking if 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b for some integers a, b. Specifically, determine if there exists an integer m such that 2^m ≡ -1 (mod 2023) or if 2^a ≡ -2^b (mod 2023) is possible. If k(n)=2 is impossible, investigate if k(n)=3 is possible by checking if 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b + 2^c.
